title: Missing validation on ngrambf index
description:
### Describe the bug
If I give a wrong parameter into a ngrambf index, ClickHouse validates it, but later I get an incorrect parameter while reading from the table.
### How to reproduce
Run:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES ('a');
ALTER TABLE t0 ADD INDEX i0 c0 TYPE ngrambf_v1(9, 1, 1, 1);
SELECT c0 FROM t0;
-- DB::Exception: Incorrect param of tokenizer 'ngrams': ngram length must be between 1 and 8, but got 9
```
Furthermore, in this case, I get a broken part:
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0 (c0 String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO TABLE t0 (c0) VALUES ('a');
DELETE FROM t0 WHERE TRUE;
ALTER TABLE t0 ADD INDEX i0 c0 TYPE ngrambf_v1(9, 1, 1, 1);
DETACH TABLE t0 SYNC;
ATTACH TABLE t0;
SELECT * FROM system.detached_parts WHERE startsWith("name", 'broken');
-- Shows one broken part
```
### Error message and/or stacktrace
Error stack trace:
```

5. src/Interpreters/ITokenExtractor.cpp:77: DB::TokenizerFactory::extractNgramParam(std::span<DB::Field const, 18446744073709551615ul>) @ 0x000000001bdd561a

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(255), c3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO t1 (c1, c2, c3) VALUES (1, 'test', NULL);
SELECT c1, c2 FROM t1 WHERE c3 IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect parameter validation for ngrambf index creation
